<?php namespace Illuminate\Foundation\Http\Events; class RequestHandled { /** * The request instance. * * @var \Illuminate\Http\Request */ public $request; /** * The response instance. * * @var \Illuminate\Http\Response */ public $response; /** * Create a new event instance. * * @param \Illuminate\Http\Request $request * @param \Illuminate\Http\Response $response */ public function __construct($request, $response) { $this->request = $request; $this->response = $response; } }
